---
title: "People"
# page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: group-members
    contents: 
      - "people/*.qmd"
      - "people/cosupervised.yaml"
    type: grid
    image-height: 250px
#    image-lazy-loading: true
    grid-columns: 3
    page-size: 30
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: sortby
  - id: collaborators
    contents: 
      - "people/collaborators.yaml"
    type: grid
    image-height: 250px
#    image-lazy-loading: true
    grid-columns: 3
    page-size: 30
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: sortby  
  - id: alumni
    contents: 
      - "people/alumni/*.qmd"
      - "people/alumni/alumni.yaml"
    type: table
    sort: sortby
    fields: [title, subtitle, destination]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    field-display-names: 
      title: "Name"
      subtitle: "Role"
      destination: "Destination"
---


## Group members

:::{#group-members}
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## Are you interested in joining our group?
Read about [opportunities to do research with us](./join_us.html).
:::

## Close collaborators

Our projects are highly interdisciplinary, and we work with a large number of colleagues. But we also have a few close collaborators with whom we regularly develop ideas, tools, run joint remote hackathons, and mutually co-host students and postdocs.

:::{#collaborators}
:::


## Alumni

:::{#alumni}
:::
